description: Grid of cards (typically 3 across on desktop). Used to promote services, packages, or any list of CTAs. Each card has an image, title, short description, and a CTA. The `variant` prop is a hint to the renderer for visual styling (e.g., services vs. packages may have different card chrome).

intro.note: Optional supporting copy under the heading.
